title: Ab Lysis Buffer
author: Colin Daniel

steps_raw.instruction: 20 millimolar (mM) Tris pH 7.5 50 millimolar (mM) NaCl 0.5 % (v/v) Triton-X100 0.5 % (v/v) DOC 0.5 % (v/v) SDS 1 millimolar (mM) EDTA
On ice add protease and phosphotase inhibitors (Roche)
